name: libdatetime-format-builder-perl
title: libdatetime-format-builder-perl
description:
module to create DateTime parsers
DateTime::Format::Builder creates DateTime parsers. Many string formats of
dates and times are simple and just require a basic regular expression to
extract the relevant information. Builder provides a simple way to do this
without writing reams of structural code.
.
Builder provides a number of methods, most of which you'll never need, or
at least rarely need. They're provided more for exposing of the module's
innards to any subclasses, or for when you need to do something slightly
unusual.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdatetime-format-builder-perl because module to create DateTime parsers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdatetime-format-builder-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdatetime-format-builder-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdatetime-format-builder-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
